summary.en: A growth-portfolio framework for managing today’s core business, emerging growth engines, and future options at the same time, so the company does not over-invest in the present or starve its next act.
summary.zh: 一套增长组合框架，用于同时管理今天的核心业务、新增长引擎和未来选项，避免公司只优化当下或饿死下一代业务。

sources.label: McKinsey & Company · Enduring Ideas: The three horizons of growth · 2009

references.label: McKinsey & Company · Enduring Ideas: The three horizons of growth

note.en: Primary consulting source for using three horizons to discuss growth over time.
note.zh: 用三层时间视角讨论增长组合的主要咨询来源。
